text:
he says, “You Bhavani”,
You my goddess,
Would give to him the water,
Falling from the crowns,
Of Vishnu, Rudra and Brahma,
At your feet,
And grant him, the eternal life in your world.
178
Aghori.it

tvayā hṛtvā vāmaṃ vapu-raparitṛptena manasā
śarīrārdhaṃ śambho-raparamapi śaṅke hṛtamabhūt |
yadetat tvadrūpaṃ sakalamaruṇābhaṃ trinayanaṃ
kucābhyāmānamraṃ kuṭila-śaśicūḍāla-makuṭam || 23 ||
Mantra: straṃ
23 (getting of all riches)
Your form in my mind,
Is the color of red of the rising sun,
Is adorned with three eyes,
Has two heavy busts,
Is slightly bent,
And wears a crown with the crescent moon,
And hence arises a doubt in me,
That you were not satisfied,
By half the body of Shambu that he gave,
And occupied all his body.
179
Aghori.it

jagatsūte dhātā hariravati rudraḥ kṣapayate
tiraskurva-nnetat svamapi vapu-rīśa-stirayati |
sadā pūrvaḥ sarvaṃ tadida manugṛhṇāti ca śiva-
stavājñā malambya kṣaṇacalitayo rbhrūlatikayoḥ || 24 ||
Mantra: namaḥ śivāya
